assertions.description: V2.0Beta: 10 components (4 connectors, 4 caps, 1 test point, 1 IC), 3 power rails, 201 nets (27 named, 174 unnamed). The large unnamed net count is expected — OCP and PCIe connectors have many pins without net labels in this design. BOM grouping is correct. Version evolution (V0.1Beta=12 comps, V1.0Beta=12, V1.1Beta=12, V2.0Beta=10) is tracked correctly across all four files.
